src/main/java/com/test/shared/domain/val._comment: Canonical shared composite VO (BC-less, lives in shared.domain.valueobject). Immutable record with the 4 canonical fields; url is a URI.
contains: public record StoredObject(String storageKey, URI url, String contentType, Long sizeBytes)

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: Provider-agnostic output port in the owning BC (catalog). Four storage operations; derived_from traceability.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: MinIO (AWS SDK v2) adapter implementing the port. public-url store → persists a stable url; injects S3Client + S3Presigner; reads bucket/base-url from storage.* config.
StoredObject expands into 4 flat columns (uniform: url always persisted, nullable). storageKey/sizeBytes inherit the property's required=true.
Mapper reconstructs StoredObject from the 4 columns and flattens it back; url ↔ URI conversion is null-safe.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: storageCalls.put wiring: the storage port is injected and the put() call is emitted (as a deterministic preamble) BEFORE the scaffold TODO; result bound to the bindsTo local.
storageCalls.delete wiring: the storage port is injected and a delete() call is emitted; storageKey resolution left as a TODO (no input provided).
Multipart File input travels through the command as a Spring MultipartFile.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: Multipart endpoint: @RequestPart MultipartFile + consumes=multipart/form-data using the value= form (positional value + named attribute would not compile), with size/content-type guards.

src/main/resources/parameters/local/stor._comment: Per-env storage config: shared S3-compatible endpoint/credentials (env placeholders only) + per-store bucket and public base-url.

src/main/resources/application-local.yam._comment: The storage param file is actually imported by the app config.
